text: For IHC, sections treated with the IHC kit (ab64261, Abcam) received peroxidase application (10 min), dual PBS washes, protein blocking, and additional PBS rinsing. Primary antibody (anti-cleaved caspase 6 ( YC0008, Immunoway, 1:100); anti-cleaved caspase 8 (abs158406, absin, 1:100) incubation proceeded overnight at 4°C in humid conditions, followed by secondary antibody treatment (1 hour, RT) after triple PBS washes. DAB chromogen development preceded hematoxylin counterstaining, ethanol dehydration, and neutral resin mounting for microscopic analysis.
